title: HOME FINDER SERVICES - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO HOME FINDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management services and assistance in finding rental housing. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 669-8350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Multnomah County: Call for an appointment Clackamas County: Referral only through the Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC) FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Housing Search Assistance Housing Search Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD JUSTICE HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - UNICA UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO
